ValidationRule.description: SAL26-640: Opportunity should be Open, sales record type and Account should match with CVE Engagement's Account.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CVE_Enagement_Validation_Rules__c), Opportunity__c != null, OR( Opportunity__r.IsClosed, Opportunity__r.RecordType.Name != 'Sales Opportunity', AND(Opportunity__r.AccountId != null, Opportunity__r.AccountId != CVE_Engagement__r.Account__c), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Type__c, 'Debooking'), Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Split_ParentID__c != null ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select Sales Open opportunity and Opportunity's Account should match with CVE Engagement's Account
